items.description: Mappings from the given reference API.

alternateKey.description: A secondary unique property (i.e. 'name' or 'code') of the records of the API.

mappings.description: List of alternate key to primary key mappings from the API, based on the given alternate key property.

items.description: Mapping of an alternate key value to its primary key value (UUID).

alternateKeyValue.description: The value of the alternate key property of a reference record.

primaryKeyValue.description: The UUID corresponding to the alternate key value.
